Liu Shi 劉石
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Shi (劉石). Defeated by Yuan Shao. Liu Shi was a bandit Liu Shi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
